author: 𝓠 (𝐪𝐮𝐚𝐧𝐭/𝐥𝐩)
title: Hiring semi 3D artist
content: Hiring an artist who can make semi 3D art Dm me or comment below

author: Sodiums
title: Commission animated banners and overlays
content: looking to commission someone to create animated banners and stream overlays (not static designs) if you have experience in this please shoot me a dm! experience in the gambling streaming niche is recommended.

author: UDORI THOMAS
title: Commission 3D clothing model
content: I am looking to commission an experienced 3D artist to model a clothing piece for Sight REDACTED. If you know a talented professional with expertise in 3D garment modeling, I would appreciate an introduction or recommendation. Please feel free to connect us. Thank you.
